title: Memorializing the unborn by lowering the United States flag to half-staff on the 22d day of January each year.
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
policy_area: Civil Rights and Liberties, Minority Issues
crs_summary: This resolution expresses support for recognizing a Day of Tears and lowering flags to half-staff to honor unborn lives lost to abortion.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
